value.effect: Played face cards give +5 Mult when scored
Hearts and Diamonds count as the same suit, Spades and Clubs count as the same suit
Choose 2 of up to 4 Joker cards
Played cards with even rank give +4 Mult when scored (10, 8, 6, 4, 2)
Earn $4 if poker hand is a Four of a Kind, poker hand changes at end of round
